svg.title: Microplastics abundance map – drone HSI polymer C-H detection
svg.desc: A spatial abundance map of microplastic particles (PE, PP, PET polymers) detected from drone hyperspectral imaging using C-H overtone bands at 1700–1750 nm and 2300–2350 nm. Classification accuracy 91%, distinct from PFAS contamination. Particle density shown as point cloud and heat zones.
svg.text: Microplastics abundance map — polymer C-H signatures
Bands: 1700–1750 nm + 2300–2350 nm · Acc. 91% · Distinct from PFAS (C-F)
Model: 3D CNN + SPA · Classification acc: 91% · 12 SWIR-dominant bands
Validation: FTIR on field samples · NOT PFAS (C-F) — distinct spectral model
Source: Icarus HSI · Enotrium field trials · microplastics ≠ PFAS — separate spectral signatures and models
